example: The garden is so peaceful in the morning.
Please do not disturb me while I am working.
He snores loudly every night.
Nose strips can help reduce snoring.
The chin strap helps stop snoring by keeping the mouth closed.
ja: あごひも（いびきを防ぐためのもの）

example: The balloon might explode if you blow it too much.
He moved silently like a ninja.
She is very considerate of others' feelings.
ja: 思いやりのある、配慮した

example: The smoke alarm went off because of the burnt toast.
Turn on the fan to cool the room.
The smoke alarm is beeping loudly.
I like to relax on the couch after work.
The snoring beast kept everyone awake all night.
zh: 打鼾怪獸（形容打鼾聲很大的人）

example: Don't jinx it by talking about the good luck.
We used pillows to wedge the door open.
Mission accomplished! We finished the project on time.
It's ironic that she snores louder than her husband.
zh: 諷刺的，具有反諷意味的

example: Don't rush, take your time.
He was snacking quietly in the kitchen.
This pasta is delicious.
